name: Times-Picayune Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sour milk (a teaspoon of vinegar added to milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2. Grease a 9x13 inch pan.
3. Combine butter, sugar, flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl.
4. Add eggs, sour milk, oil, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
5. Stir in grated zucchini.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips on top of the cake.
8. Serve with whipped cream.
